name: Wove SEO Audit Schema
description: Comprehensive SEO audit plan for Wove AI terminal. Combines real-browser execution (web_exec_js, web_click, web_type_input) with deep SEO knowledge. The agent selects checks based on site_type, industry_vertical, and audit_level, executes them using Wove tools, and produces a structured report. Based on Wove tools + claude-seo knowledge (MIT license, AgriciDaniel).

industry_verticals._note: Auto-detected for local_business type. Routes to industry-specific schema and checks. See references/local-schema-types.md

quick.label: Quick Scan
quick.description: Fast check of critical issues. 2-5 minutes. Catches dealbreakers.
quick.focus: Only critical and high severity checks

standard.label: Standard Audit
standard.description: Full audit covering all major categories. 10-20 minutes. Production-ready report.
standard.focus: Critical, high, and medium severity checks

deep.label: Deep Audit
deep.description: Comprehensive audit with competitive analysis and advanced checks. 30-60 minutes. Agency-grade report.
deep.focus: All checks including low severity, competitor comparison, content gap analysis

severity_levels.critical: Blocks indexing, causes ranking drops, or breaks core functionality
severity_levels.high: Significant negative impact on rankings or user experience
severity_levels.medium: Missed optimization opportunity with measurable impact
severity_levels.info: Informational finding, no direct action needed

priority_levels.high: Fix within 1 week. Significant SEO improvement.

checks.name: robots.txt
checks.what: Exists, accessible, no critical Disallow rules, Sitemap directive present
checks.how: web_read_text on /robots.txt

checks.name: XML sitemap
checks.what: Exists, valid XML, URLs present, lastmod recent
checks.how: web_read_text on /sitemap.xml and /sitemap_index.xml

checks.name: Meta robots / noindex
checks.what: No accidental noindex on important pages
checks.how: web_read_html on homepage and key pages. Check <meta name='robots'>

checks.name: Canonical tags
checks.what: Present, self-referencing, consistent protocol/domain, no HTTP/HTTPS mismatch
checks.how: web_read_html on 3-5 key pages. Check <link rel='canonical'>

checks.name: Hreflang (multilingual)
checks.what: Bidirectional references, x-default set, correct language codes
checks.how: web_read_html on homepage for <link rel='alternate' hreflang>

checks.name: HTTP status codes
checks.what: Clean 200 responses, no redirect chains > 1 hop, no soft 404s
checks.how: Navigate key pages, check for redirect chains

checks.name: JavaScript rendering dependency
checks.what: Critical content in initial HTML, not only JS-injected
checks.how: web_read_text vs web_read_html comparison. Check for empty <div id='app'>. Dec 2025 Google update: canonical/noindex in raw HTML may override JS changes.

checks.name: AI crawler management
checks.what: Conscious policy for GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended, Bytespider in robots.txt
checks.how: web_read_text on /robots.txt. Check each AI crawler directive. Note: blocking Google-Extended does NOT affect Search/AI Overviews. Blocking GPTBot does NOT prevent ChatGPT citation via ChatGPT-User.

checks.name: IndexNow protocol
checks.what: Check if site supports IndexNow for Bing, Yandex, Naver (faster non-Google indexing)
checks.how: Check for IndexNow key file or API integration signals

02_technical_performance.label: Technical Performance & Core Web Vitals
02_technical_performance.thresholds_note: LCP <2.5s good, INP <200ms good (replaced FID March 2024), CLS <0.1 good. 75th percentile of real user data. Unchanged since original definitions. See references/cwv-thresholds.md

checks.name: Page load assessment
checks.what: < 50 requests, < 3MB total weight, critical resources within 2.5s
checks.how: web_exec_js: count scripts, stylesheets, images. Performance API timing.

checks.name: LCP element identification
checks.what: LCP element optimized: preloaded, modern format, explicit dimensions, no lazy-loading above fold
checks.how: web_exec_js: PerformanceObserver for 'largest-contentful-paint'. Check LCP subparts: TTFB (<800ms) + Resource Load Delay + Resource Load Time + Element Render Delay.

checks.name: CLS sources
checks.what: All media has explicit dimensions, fonts use display:swap, no unsized ad slots
checks.how: web_read_html: check all /

checks.name: INP readiness
checks.what: No long tasks >50ms on interaction, minimal third-party JS, DOM <1500 elements
checks.how: web_exec_js: Performance.getEntriesByType('longtask'), count event listeners, document.querySelectorAll('*').length for DOM size.

checks.name: Image optimization
checks.what: Modern formats (WebP/AVIF), responsive srcset, lazy loading below fold, no oversized images
checks.how: web_exec_js: collect all , check src format, srcset, loading attribute, naturalWidth vs displayWidth.

checks.name: Resource hints and preloading
checks.what: Preconnect to critical origins, preload for LCP resource and primary font
checks.how: web_read_html <head> for <link rel='preconnect'>, <link rel='preload'>, <link rel='dns-prefetch'>.

checks.name: Render-blocking resources
checks.what: Critical CSS inlined, non-critical deferred, scripts async/deferred
checks.how: web_read_html <head>: count <link rel='stylesheet'> without media, <script> without async/defer.

checks.name: Mobile responsiveness
checks.what: Viewport meta, no horizontal scroll, touch targets min 48x48px
checks.how: web_read_html for viewport meta. web_exec_js: scrollWidth > clientWidth check. Mobile-first indexing 100% complete since July 2024.

checks.name: HTTPS and security headers
checks.what: Full HTTPS, no mixed content, HSTS, CSP, X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options
checks.how: Check protocol, web_exec_js for mixed content warnings.

checks.name: HTTP/2+ and compression
checks.what: HTTP/2 or HTTP/3, Brotli or gzip
checks.how: web_exec_js: performance.getEntriesByType('navigation')[0].nextHopProtocol.

03_content_structure.label: Content Structure & On-Page SEO
03_content_structure.quality_gates_note: See references/quality-gates.md for word count minimums by page type. Word count is NOT a direct ranking factor (John Mueller confirmed) but indicates topical coverage depth.

checks.name: Title tag
checks.what: 50-60 chars, primary keyword near start, brand at end, unique per page
checks.how: web_read_html <head> extract <title>.

checks.name: Meta description
checks.what: 120-160 chars, includes keyword naturally, has CTA, unique per page
checks.how: web_read_html <head> extract <meta name='description'>.

checks.name: Heading hierarchy
checks.what: Single H1 with primary keyword, logical H2-H6, no skipped levels
checks.how: web_seo_audit returns heading structure.

checks.name: Content quality and depth
checks.what: Adequate length for page type, unique content, addresses user intent
checks.how: web_read_text on key pages. Check word count vs quality-gates minimums (Homepage 500, Blog 1500, Product 400, Service 800).

checks.name: Internal linking
checks.what: Descriptive anchor text, breadcrumbs, key pages within 3 clicks, 2-5 contextual links per 1000 words
checks.how: web_exec_js: collect all internal <a> links, check anchor text quality.

checks.name: Image alt text
checks.what: All content images have descriptive alt (10-125 chars), decorative images have alt=''
checks.how: web_seo_audit returns alt text analysis.

checks.name: URL structure
checks.what: Clean slugs with keywords, no excessive parameters, consistent pattern, <100 chars
checks.how: Analyze current page URL and linked URLs.

checks.name: Content freshness
checks.what: Dates visible on articles, dateModified in schema, copyright year current
checks.how: web_read_html + web_read_text for datePublished/dateModified signals.

checks.name: Duplicate content
checks.what: Unique titles/descriptions per page, no filter URL duplication
checks.how: Navigate 5-10 key pages, compare titles and meta descriptions.

checks.name: FAQ / Q&A content
checks.what: FAQ sections present on key pages, questions match real user queries
checks.how: web_read_text for FAQ sections. Note: FAQPage schema rich results only for gov/health sites since Aug 2023, but still benefits AI citation.

checks.name: Semantic HTML
checks.what: Uses <header>, <nav>, <main>, <article>, <footer>, not all divs
checks.how: web_read_html verify semantic elements.

04_structured_data.label: Structured Data (JSON-LD / Schema.org)
04_structured_data.reference_note: See references/schema-types.md for full deprecation status. NEVER recommend HowTo (deprecated Sept 2023). FAQPage restricted to gov/health (Aug 2023). SpecialAnnouncement deprecated July 2025. See schema/templates.json for ready-to-use JSON-LD. Content with proper schema has ~2.5x higher chance of AI citation.

checks.name: JSON-LD presence and validity
checks.what: At least one valid JSON-LD block, no syntax errors
checks.how: web_seo_audit + web_exec_js: JSON.parse all <script type='application/ld+json'> blocks.

checks.name: Organization / LocalBusiness
checks.what: Name, url, logo, contactPoint, sameAs, description. LocalBusiness: +address, telephone, openingHours, geo (5+ decimal places), priceRange
checks.how: web_seo_audit on homepage. Use most specific subtype (OnlineStore not OnlineBusiness, Restaurant not LocalBusiness).

checks.name: Product schema (e-commerce)
checks.what: name, image, description, sku/gtin, brand, offers (price, currency, availability). Price must match visible price. AggregateRating must match visible reviews.
checks.how: web_seo_audit on 2-3 product pages. Check variant handling with ProductGroup.

checks.name: Article / BlogPosting
checks.what: headline, datePublished, dateModified, author (Person with name+url, not just string), publisher, image
checks.how: web_seo_audit on 2-3 articles. Author as Person with sameAs links is critical for E-E-A-T.

checks.name: BreadcrumbList
checks.what: Matches visible breadcrumbs, correct hierarchy, valid URLs
checks.how: web_seo_audit on category/product/article pages.

checks.name: FAQPage (if present)
checks.what: Matches visible FAQ exactly. Info priority on commercial sites (benefits AI citation, not Google rich results since Aug 2023).
checks.how: web_seo_audit. Verify Q&A visible on page (not schema-only spam).

checks.name: WebSite + SearchAction
checks.what: WebSite schema with sitelinks searchbox potential
checks.how: web_seo_audit on homepage.

checks.name: Service schema
checks.what: serviceType, provider linked to Organization, areaServed
checks.how: web_seo_audit on service pages.

checks.name: Review / AggregateRating
checks.what: ratingValue, reviewCount, bestRating match visible review data. Reviews MUST be visible on page.
checks.how: web_seo_audit. Cross-check visible reviews vs schema values.

checks.name: Person schema (authors)
checks.what: Person with name, jobTitle, url, sameAs (LinkedIn, Wikipedia), image, worksFor
checks.how: web_seo_audit on author/team pages. Critical for E-E-A-T after Dec 2025 update.

checks.name: @graph and @id consistency
checks.what: @graph pattern used, @id URIs stable, entities cross-referenced, no duplicate graphs from plugins
checks.how: web_exec_js: parse all JSON-LD blocks, check @id consistency.

checks.name: Shipping/Return schema (e-commerce)
checks.what: shippingDetails and hasMerchantReturnPolicy in Offer. returnPolicyCountry required since March 2025.
checks.how: web_seo_audit on product pages.

checks.name: Deprecated schema detection
checks.what: Flag: HowTo (removed Sept 2023), SpecialAnnouncement (July 2025), ClaimReview (June 2025), VehicleListing (June 2025), Dataset (late 2025)
checks.how: web_exec_js: scan all JSON-LD @type values against deprecated list.

checks.name: VideoObject schema
checks.what: If video content present: name, description, thumbnailUrl, uploadDate, duration, contentUrl. Clip markup for key moments.
checks.how: web_seo_audit. Check for video elements without corresponding schema.

05_authority_eeat.label: Authority & E-E-A-T Signals
05_authority_eeat.reference_note: See references/eeat-framework.md. Dec 2025 core update: E-E-A-T now applies to ALL competitive queries, not just YMYL. Anonymous/generic authorship penalized even for non-YMYL. Experience signals are key differentiator (AI cannot fabricate genuine experience).

checks.name: About page
checks.what: Company info, team members with photos/bios, founding story, verifiable address, registration info
checks.how: Navigate to /about. web_read_text.

checks.name: Author pages and bios
checks.what: Authors attributed with link to bio page, credentials, expertise, social links, Person schema
checks.how: web_read_text on blog/article pages for author attribution + author page.

checks.name: Contact information
checks.what: Phone, email, physical address, contact form, social links visible on every page (footer)
checks.how: web_read_text on homepage and /contact.

checks.name: Trust signals
checks.what: Customer reviews/testimonials, partner logos, certifications/awards, case studies, media mentions
checks.how: web_read_text on homepage and landing pages.

checks.name: Legal pages
checks.what: Privacy policy, terms of service, cookie policy - present, accessible from every page, substantive content
checks.how: Check footer links. web_read_text to verify not empty.

checks.name: Social media linkage
checks.what: Social links in footer + sameAs in Organization schema. Profiles active and consistent.
checks.how: web_read_html footer for social links. Cross-reference with schema sameAs.

checks.name: Content originality
checks.what: Original research, unique data, real examples, first-hand experience signals. Not generic AI-generated.
checks.how: web_read_text on 3-5 content pages. Look for: original photos, specific data, personal process docs, case studies.

checks.name: YMYL compliance
checks.what: Health/finance/legal content: qualified author credentials, disclaimers, source citations
checks.how: Identify YMYL topics. Check for professional credentials and disclaimers.

checks.name: NAP consistency (local)
checks.what: Name, Address, Phone identical everywhere: footer, contact page, schema, GBP
checks.how: web_read_text on homepage, contact, about, footer. Compare all NAP instances.

checks.name: Topical authority
checks.what: Clear topic clusters with pillar pages, deep coverage, strong interlinking
checks.how: web_read_text on sitemap and navigation. Analyze content cluster coverage.

06_ai_search_readiness.label: AI Search & GEO (Generative Engine Optimization)
06_ai_search_readiness.reference_note: Brand mentions correlate 3x more strongly with AI visibility than backlinks (Ahrefs Dec 2025, 75k brands). YouTube mentions strongest signal (~0.737 correlation). Only 11% of domains cited by both ChatGPT and Google AI Overviews for same query. AI crawlers do NOT execute JavaScript - SSR is critical.

checks.name: Entity clarity
checks.what: Clear definition of business/product in first paragraph + schema + sameAs links to authoritative profiles
checks.how: web_seo_audit + web_read_text on homepage/about.

checks.name: Citability scoring
checks.what: Clear, extractable answer blocks of 134-167 words. Direct answer in first 40-60 words of section. Definitions: 'X is...' patterns.
checks.how: web_read_text on key content pages. Identify self-contained answer blocks.

checks.name: AI crawler access
checks.what: Conscious policy for GPTBot, OAI-SearchBot, ChatGPT-User, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, anthropic-ai, Bytespider, cohere-ai, CCBot
checks.how: web_read_text on /robots.txt. Recommendation: allow GPTBot, OAI-SearchBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot for AI search visibility.

checks.name: llms.txt file
checks.what: Emerging standard: /llms.txt with structured site description, key pages, facts for AI crawlers
checks.how: web_read_text on /llms.txt. Check for: title, description, section links, key facts.

checks.name: Server-side rendering for AI
checks.what: Key content available without JS execution (AI crawlers don't execute JS)
checks.how: web_read_html raw source vs web_read_text rendered. Check if content exists in initial HTML.

checks.name: Structural readability for AI
checks.what: Question-based headings, short paragraphs (2-4 sentences), tables for comparisons, lists for steps. 92% of AI Overview citations come from top-10 pages.
checks.how: web_read_text + web_read_html on content pages. Assess heading format, paragraph length, table/list usage.

checks.name: Multi-modal content
checks.what: Text + images + video + infographics. 156% higher AI citation selection rate with multi-modal content.
checks.how: web_exec_js: count images, videos, iframes, interactive elements on key pages.

checks.name: Brand mention presence
checks.what: Check presence on platforms AI systems source from: Wikipedia, Reddit, YouTube, LinkedIn, Yelp, TripAdvisor
checks.how: Agent notes platforms to check. For deep audit: web_open competitor platform pages.

checks.name: Speakable markup
checks.what: Speakable schema with cssSelector pointing to key content blocks (voice search)
checks.how: web_exec_js: check JSON-LD for Speakable type.

checks.name: RSL 1.0 licensing
checks.what: Really Simple Licensing (Dec 2025) - machine-readable AI licensing terms. Backed by Reddit, Yahoo, Medium, Quora, Cloudflare.
checks.how: Check for RSL implementation.

07_local_seo.label: Local SEO
07_local_seo.reference_note: See references/local-seo-signals.md and references/local-schema-types.md. GBP signals: 32% of local pack weight. Proximity: 55.2% of ranking variance. Review signals: ~20%. ChatGPT local conversion: 15.9% vs Google organic 1.76%. 18-day rule: rankings cliff if no new reviews for 3 weeks.

checks.name: Business type detection
checks.what: Classify as brick-and-mortar, SAB (service area business), or hybrid. Determines which checks apply.
checks.how: web_read_text: look for physical address, Google Maps embed, 'service area', 'we come to you'.

checks.name: GBP integration signals
checks.what: GBP embed/widget, Maps iframe, reviews widget, consistent NAP with GBP
checks.how: web_read_html for Maps iframe, GBP place ID, reviews widget.

checks.name: LocalBusiness schema subtype
checks.what: Correct industry-specific subtype (Restaurant, MedicalClinic, LegalService, etc.), not generic LocalBusiness
checks.how: web_seo_audit. Check @type against industry_verticals detection. Load references/local-schema-types.md for per-vertical schema patterns.

checks.name: NAP on-page consistency
checks.what: Name, Address, Phone identical in: visible HTML footer, contact page header, LocalBusiness JSON-LD schema
checks.how: web_read_text on footer + contact page. Compare with schema values.

checks.name: Review signals
checks.what: 10+ Google reviews (threshold), 4.5+ stars, reviews in last 3 months, owner responses present. AggregateRating in schema matches.
checks.how: web_read_text for review count/rating. web_seo_audit for AggregateRating schema.

checks.name: Local on-page SEO
checks.what: City+service in title and H1, dedicated service pages (one per core service), click-to-call (tel: link), embedded map
checks.how: web_read_html: check title, H1 for local keywords. Check for tel: links. Check for Maps iframe.

checks.name: Location page quality (multi-location)
checks.what: >60% unique content. Swap test: if swapping city name still makes sense, it's a doorway page. Unique photos, local testimonials, local FAQs.
checks.how: web_read_text on 2-3 location pages. Compare content overlap.

checks.name: Citation presence
checks.what: Tier 1: Google, Yelp, BBB, Facebook. Recommend: Apple Business Connect (27% usage, doubled), Bing Places (powers ChatGPT/Copilot/Alexa)
checks.how: Agent flags citation platforms to check/claim.

checks.name: Local content signals
checks.what: City/region mentions, local landmarks, service area descriptions, local case studies
checks.how: web_read_text on key pages for location-specific content.

checks.name: Local authority signals
checks.what: Chamber of Commerce, BBB accreditation, local news/press mentions, community involvement, 'best of' list presence (top AI visibility factor)
checks.how: web_read_text for badges, affiliations, press mentions.

checks.name: CTA clarity
checks.what: Clear primary CTA above fold, action-oriented text, visually distinct
checks.how: web_read_text + web_exec_js on key landing pages.

checks.name: No intrusive interstitials
checks.what: No full-screen popups on entry, cookie banner doesn't block content, popups properly timed
checks.how: web_read_html observe page load. Check for immediate overlays.

checks.name: 404 page experience
checks.what: Custom 404 with search, navigation, links to key pages. Not default server error.
checks.how: web_open a non-existent URL. web_read_text.

checks.name: Form usability
checks.what: Minimal fields, clear labels, inline validation, privacy notice near submit
checks.how: web_read_html on pages with forms.

checks.name: Price transparency
checks.what: Price visible, shipping/tax info accessible before checkout, no hidden costs
checks.how: web_read_text on product/pricing pages.

checks.name: Open Graph tags
checks.what: og:title, og:description, og:image (1200x630 min), og:url (matches canonical), og:type
checks.how: web_seo_audit returns OG data.

checks.name: Twitter/X Card tags
checks.what: twitter:card (summary_large_image), twitter:site, twitter:creator, twitter:image
checks.how: web_read_html <head>.

checks.name: Favicon and web manifest
checks.what: Custom favicon, apple-touch-icon, web manifest with theme color
checks.how: web_read_html <head> for rel='icon', rel='apple-touch-icon', rel='manifest'.

10_programmatic_seo.label: Programmatic SEO (Scale Pages)
10_programmatic_seo.quality_gates_note: WARNING at 100+ generated pages. HARD STOP at 500+ without audit. Each page must pass swap test. See references/quality-gates.md for safe vs risky page types.

checks.name: Template uniqueness
checks.what: Each generated page reads as standalone valuable resource. No mad-libs patterns (just swapping city/product in identical text).
checks.how: web_read_text on 3-5 generated pages. Compare content overlap percentage.

checks.name: Doorway page detection
checks.what: Swap test: can you swap the variable (city, product) and content still makes sense? If yes, it's a doorway page.
checks.how: web_read_text on multiple generated pages. Compare structure and unique content ratio.

checks.name: Index bloat prevention
checks.what: Unnecessary pages noindexed or canonicalized. Filter URLs not creating duplicate content.
checks.how: Check for noindex on thin generated pages, canonical on parameter URLs.

checks.name: Competitor structured data comparison
checks.what: Compare schema types and property coverage with top 2-3 competitors
checks.how: web_open + web_seo_audit on competitor URLs.

checks.name: Competitor content gap analysis
checks.what: Identify topic clusters and content types present on competitors but missing
checks.how: web_read_text on competitor navigation/sitemap.

checks.name: Competitor performance benchmark
checks.what: Compare resource counts, image optimization, JS payload with competitors
checks.how: Run TP01-TP05 checks on competitor pages.

tool_mapping.description: Wove terminal tools available for audit execution. Key advantage over CLI-based SEO tools: real browser context with JavaScript execution.
tool_mapping.web_read_text: Clean text extraction by CSS selector. Content analysis, word count, text quality.
tool_mapping.web_read_html: Raw HTML extraction. Meta tags, structured data in HTML, semantic elements, head section.
tool_mapping.web_seo_audit: Full SEO audit: JSON-LD, Open Graph, meta tags, headings, alt text, links. Primary tool for structured data.
tool_mapping.web_exec_js: Execute JavaScript in page context. Performance API, DOM measurements, computed styles, dynamic content. THIS IS THE KEY DIFFERENTIATOR - real browser metrics, not curl.
tool_mapping.web_click: Click elements by CSS selector. Test navigation, expand accordions, pagination, interactive elements.
tool_mapping.web_type_input: Type into inputs. Test search functionality, forms, login flows.
tool_mapping.web_press_key: Simulate key presses. Keyboard navigation, form submission, accessibility testing.
tool_mapping.web_open: Open new browser widget with URL. Navigate to pages, competitor analysis, multi-page audit.
tool_mapping.term_run_command: Run terminal commands. Curl checks, DNS lookups, SSL verification, Claude Code integration.

reference_files._note: Load on-demand as needed, do NOT load all at startup
reference_files.cwv_thresholds: references/cwv-thresholds.md - Current Core Web Vitals thresholds, LCP subparts, measurement tools
reference_files.eeat_framework: references/eeat-framework.md - E-E-A-T evaluation criteria, Sept 2025 QRG + Dec 2025 core update
reference_files.schema_types: references/schema-types.md - All supported schema types with deprecation status (Feb 2026)
reference_files.quality_gates: references/quality-gates.md - Content length minimums, uniqueness thresholds, doorway detection
reference_files.local_seo_signals: references/local-seo-signals.md - Local ranking factors, review benchmarks, citation tiers, GBP
reference_files.local_schema_types: references/local-schema-types.md - LocalBusiness subtypes by industry, citation sources per vertical
reference_files.schema_templates: schema/templates.json - Ready-to-use JSON-LD snippets for VideoObject, BroadcastEvent, Clip, etc.

execution_instructions.step_1: Ask user for: target URL, site type (or auto-detect from signals), audit level (quick/standard/deep)
execution_instructions.step_2: Open the target URL with web_open
execution_instructions.step_3: Run web_seo_audit on homepage for baseline data (JSON-LD, OG, meta, headings, links)
execution_instructions.step_4: Auto-detect site_type and industry_vertical from page signals
execution_instructions.step_5: Based on site_type, industry_vertical, and audit_level, select applicable checks
execution_instructions.step_6: Load relevant reference files on-demand as needed
execution_instructions.step_7: Execute checks in category order using appropriate Wove tools
execution_instructions.step_8: For each check: record status (pass/partial/fail), evidence, specific fix with code example where applicable
execution_instructions.step_9: Calculate weighted scores per category and overall (use scoring.weights)
execution_instructions.step_10: Generate report: executive summary, score overview, critical issues first, category results, prioritized action plan
execution_instructions.step_11: For deep audits: run key checks on 2-3 competitor URLs for comparison
